title: Kerala High Court directs family courts to follow child custody guidelines issued by Calcutta HC
description: The Kerala High Court on Monday directed all courts in the State to follow guidelines formulated by the Calcutta High Court last year on navigating child custody cases. A Bench of Chief Justice Soumen Sen and Justice Syam Kumar added that these guidelines can be followed until such rules are formed for Kerala.
